description_long: This is an adult male figure with a well-groomed beard and short hair, dressed in a long-sleeve crewneck shirt and fitted pants. The shirt is plain and contrasts with the pants, which are slightly loose and extend to the ankles. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the posture is upright, suggesting a neutral, at-rest stance. The shoes are simple and low-profile, suitable for walking in urban environments. The facial features are stylized but clearly defined, with a prominent brow and jawline. The overall build is average, with proportional limbs and a naturalistic body shape.
description: An adult male figure standing upright, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, fitted pants, and simple shoes, with a beard and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, long-sleeve shirt, and relaxed hands at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and leg contours, similar to the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants
